title: Arcane Power increases modifier by revealed hand count

card.rawText: During battle, reveal any number of cards from your hand. Increase the equipped creature's Modifier for that battle by the number of cards revealed.

effect.value: During battle, reveal any number of cards from your hand. Increase the equipped creature's Modifier for that battle by the number of cards revealed.

plan.title: Arcane Power increases modifier by revealed hand count
plan.summary: During battle, reveal cards from hand and verify equipped creature Modifier increases by the number revealed for that battle.

notes: Read text first: During battle, reveal any number of cards from your hand. Increase the equipped creature's Modifier for that battle by the number of cards revealed.

steps: Set up Arcane Power according to its printed text.
During battle, reveal cards from hand and verify equipped creature Modifier increases by the number revealed for that battle.
